name: @borjie/process-reward-model
description: Process Reward Model (PRM) + Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) search-based reasoning engine. Heuristic PRM signals (cite-presence, compliance-precondition, math-check, schema-validity, policy-alignment), UCB1 selection, K-wide expansion, depth-bounded simulation, incremental backpropagation. Closes P0 #1 from the 18BB gap analysis. See Docs/DESIGN/PRM_MCTS_REASONING_SPEC.md.
